failure_reason: The next DB migration slice moved /vision hub data out of React arrays. A new /api/vision/{domain}/hub endpoint reads scoped graph nodes for sections, galleries, blueprints, emerging visions, and orientation words; /vision now renders that payload with explicit empty states instead of embedding the hub catalog in code.
